title: 0.5 M EDTA (0.5 L)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"vi2q","text":"Is used in a multitude of experiments, but is often used as an ingredient in 10x TBE buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"fneog","text":"Make sure you are able to use the pH machine and an autoclave machine","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"6hsju","text":"Will be using NaOH pellets, make sure to wear gloves.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fill 0.5 L bottle with 300mL of deionized water.
Add 95.05 g of Ethylenediamine Tetraacetic Acid Disodium Salt Dihydrate to the water and mix. The pH will be about 3 at this points. The pH needs to be at 8.
Add NaOH pellets until the pH is at 8. This will be about 105 pellets. Can check if at 8 with pH machine or with pH paper.
Once at pH 8, fill to 500 mL.
Autoclave under setting 12 with water in the container to prevent over boiling.
creator: Haven Himmighoefer
